description_long: This is a modern wristwatch with a square, carbon-fiber-textured case and a black analog dial. The dial features bold white hour markers, two subdials with unique textures, and the brand name 'RAGE' prominently displayed at the top. Four red screws accentuate the corners of the case, adding a sporty and industrial touch. The strap is matte black, likely made of rubber or silicone, and is secured with a traditional buckle and two keepers. A prominent crown is located on the right side of the case for adjusting the time. The overall design is robust and contemporary, suitable for urban and active lifestyles.
description: A square, carbon-fiber-textured wristwatch with a black analog dial, red corner screws, and a matte black rubber strap. The dial features bold markers, subdials, and the 'RAGE' logo.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the circular strap and the carbon-fiber-textured case sides.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the black dial, white markers, subdials, red screws, and the 'RAGE' logo.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the thickness of the case, the carbon-fiber texture, and the prominent crown.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the matte black strap, buckle, and keepers, with the case partially visible.
attribute_brand_logo: The word 'RAGE' in uppercase letters is centered near the top of the dial, serving as the brand logo.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is black with a subtle textured pattern, featuring bold white hour markers at 3, 6, 9, and 12, and simple indices for other hours. Two subdials with distinct textures are positioned symmetrically. Four red screws are visible at the corners of the case, adding a decorative and industrial element.
attribute_strap_type: Matte black rubber or silicone strap with a smooth finish, secured by a traditional buckle and two keepers.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three central hands (hour, minute, second) and two subdials. No digital elements are present.
